name: Single in Bavaria - standard care rates
description: Single person earning €75,000 in Bavaria — same as Berlin result since both use standard care rates

sources.description: Income tax (€14,175) computed via §32a EStG 2025 Zone 3 formula for zvE=59,383. Bavaria uses standard care rate 2.4% childless (same as Berlin and 13 other states).
sources.notes: Bavaria (BY) uses standard care rate 2.4% childless — same as Berlin/Hamburg/etc. Result identical to single-median-income.json (Berlin). Confirms region-independence for standard states.
